title: The Gelato Capital of the World

scenes.text: Bologna is considered the gelato capital, serving delicious flavors everywhere.
This is Bologna, situated in the Emilia-Romagna region of Italy.
Bologna boasts some of the oldest gelato shops, crafting this treat since the 16th century.
You can find unique flavors you can't resist!
scenes.label: UNIQUE FLAVORS

scenes.text: Follow for the planet's best-kept secrets.

description: 📍 Bologna, Emilia-Romagna - Italy. Known as the gelato capital, it offers flavors dating back to the 16th century. Follow for daily hidden places! 🍦
